title: Summer Break: Week of June 29
summary: Stratechery is on summer break the week of June 29. There will be no Weekly Article or Updates. The next Update will be on Monday, July 6. Dithering, Sharp Tech, and Sharp China will also return the week of July 6. Greatest of All Talk and Asianometry will continue to publish. The full Stratechery posting schedule is here.
